hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$(cat)" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$(cat)" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); BLOCKED_PATTERNS="rm -rf /|rm -rf \\\\|drop database|DROP DATABASE|DROP TABLE|format c:|del /f /s /q|rmdir /s /q C:"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "$BLOCKED_PATTERNS"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
curl -s -d "EventPulse: Claude finished current task. Check terminal." ntfy.sh/eventpulse-claude
